title: Polish Beef Stew Intensified
description: A hearty Polish-inspired stew made with tender beef, rich flavors, and a hint of intense maltiness. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add onion, carrot, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add malt vinegar, beer, and beef broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
